summary.authoritative_rule: the commercial-aerospace minute branch may keep expanding only while the local 1min rules remain sparse and bounded on the broader retained-symbol session surface

triage_rows.rationale: the broader session surface should remain sparse enough to keep the minute rules interpretable and governed
session expansion auditing still belongs to supervision and does not authorize replay modification

interpretation: V1.32L turns the broader local-session expansion audit into a governance verdict.
The relevant question is no longer seed coherence, but whether the minute rules stay sparse enough on the retained-symbol session surface to remain interpretable.
